lore.summary: A founding and highly influential member system of the Solarian League, on the planet Beowulf in Sigma Draconis — just 16.3 ly from Sol and the home of humanity's foremost biosciences and genetic-medicine establishment. Author of the Beowulf Code on genetic engineering, and a long-standing friend of Manticore: Beowulf holds the far terminus of the Manticore Wormhole Junction (the Beowulf Terminus) and ultimately broke with the League over its hostility to the Star Empire.
lore.legislature: Chamber of Shareholders + Chamber of Professions

territory.note: Sigma Draconis is already a built system; this record makes the affiliation real.
